Greenie Insights & Stories

Market insights, sourcing notes, and product stories from Greenie Vietnam.

Vietnamese Qualified Cashews

2026-05-02

Export-ready white whole cashew kernels from Binh Phuoc, Vietnam. Grades, packaging, and compliance for global wholesale buyers.

Vietnamese Artisanal Cane Sugar

2026-05-02

Traditional Vietnamese 'Duong Phoi' cane sugar — preservative-free, crafted for wholesale, retail, and private label markets.

Shan Tuyet Ancient Tea

2026-05-02

Wild-grown ancient tea from 200+ year-old trees in Ha Giang's misty highlands. A rare Vietnamese heritage tea for premium buyers.
